prompt: Who do I need to talk to about standardising integration across domains — we're proposing a managed API gateway and a shared event backbone, and I want to retire a load of point-to-point batch interfaces.

assertions.rationale: API contracts, event backbone, and point-to-point sprawl are verbatim his remit and concerns.

assertions.text: Ahmed Benali is the highest-scored stakeholder (8-10)
assertions.rationale: He is the clear owner; the ranking should reflect that.

assertions.text: Every listed stakeholder has a relevancy score from 1 to 10
Every listed stakeholder has a written rationale naming the relevance axis
Stakeholders are ordered by relevancy score, highest first
Does not list any person outside the six synthetic-data entries (no fabricated people)
Only genuinely relevant people are listed; clearly off-topic people (e.g. Charlotte Dubois) are omitted or low-scored unless a reason is given
